# sage-setting

**Sage Setting — view and change how /sage runs (mode + default steps, per machine)**

**Use when:** the user runs `/sage-setting`, or asks to change how /sage asks/runs.

Thin adapter — the command body lives in **one** place:
**`agents/sage/commands/sage-setting.md`**. Read that file and follow it verbatim.
Do not duplicate its steps here; edit the canonical file to change behaviour.
